overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses a covered sidewalk, crosses a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, and continues along wet pavement reflecting colorful advertisements and streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk under transit overpass

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a red jacket along a covered walkway, maintaining steady pace behind them

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead of ego, leading the way along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement structure with blue trim and glowing panels displaying commercial content
concrete and metal overhead structure providing cover, with visible support beams
sleek cyberpunk-style vehicles parked along the curb with reflective surfaces
low wall separating sidewalk from adjacent structure with vertical slats

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a covered urban walkway beneath a transit overpass at night. The camera follows a character in a red jacket past a large illuminated vertical billboard on the left and parked futuristic vehicles on the right. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the neon lighting from surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk with overhead digital displays

events.description: exits covered sidewalk area into open intersection space with visible sky
begins crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk, moving from sidewalk to street level

agents.ego_description: transitioning from covered walkway to open intersection, beginning to cross the wide street with yellow markings

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: large suspended digital display showing advertisements with text 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' and brand imagery
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes and glowing green directional arrows
wide staircase leading up to pedestrian overpass or building entrance with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a wide, open intersection dominated by overhead digital billboards displaying advertisements. The scene transitions from sheltered to exposed as the character steps onto a broad yellow-striped crosswalk. Futuristic vehicles are visible on the road, and the wet asphalt reflects the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection crossing with pedestrian overpass visible ahead

events.description: pedestrian traffic light changes, allowing crossing to continue

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection crosswalk, moving steadily toward the opposite sidewalk while other pedestrians cross in various directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants crossing from left to right in front of ego

entered.detail: elevated walkway structure with stairs and illuminated underside spanning the intersection
tall pole with multiple bright floodlights illuminating the crosswalk area

segments.scene_description: The character continues across the expansive intersection, surrounded by other pedestrians moving in different directions. The pedestrian overpass bridge looms ahead with its distinctive architecture and lighting. Street lamps cast bright pools of light onto the wet yellow crosswalk stripes, while digital billboards remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk adjacent to concrete building with stair access

events.description: completes crossing and steps onto opposite sidewalk next to concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past concrete stairs and building walls, maintaining steady walking pace

entered.detail: smooth concrete facade of adjacent building with minimal detailing
vertical structural column wrapped with illuminated digital advertisements and neon accents
colorful wall postings and advertisements on the building surface

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk beside a concrete building featuring wide stairs and digital advertising pillars. The environment shifts from the open intersection back to a more enclosed streetscape, with graffiti posters and neon signs visible on the building walls. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a wide, neon-lit intersection before returning to a confined streetscape. It begins beneath a transit overpass, following a character in a red jacket past an illuminated vertical billboard and parked futuristic vehicles on a wet, reflective sidewalk. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens into an expansive intersection where the camera tracks them across broad yellow-striped crosswalks beneath towering digital billboards and bright street lamps. The movement continues through a crowd of pedestrians toward a looming architectural overpass bridge, while the wet asphalt mirrors the surrounding colorful advertisements. Finally, the environment shifts back to a more enclosed setting as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, passing concrete stairs, digital advertising pillars, and graffiti-covered walls.
